message:
feat: Add toon integration and enhance CLI output

- Updated Cargo.toml with new dependency
- Updated Cargo.lock with dependency tree
- Enhanced CLI commands: list, load, show with improved output
- Added toon formatting to search results
- Improved skill card and suggestion formatters
- Enhanced output module with rich terminal support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
